title: Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited:
Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Finance Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
